steps.title: Extract counts from the table
steps.content: The row At least 40 years old and column Total shows 107 members at least 40 years old. The bottom-right cell shows 135 total members in the organization.

steps.title: Calculate the probability
steps.content: A randomly selected member is at least 40 years old in 107 out of 135 cases: $$\frac{107}{135}$$ That matches choice D — D is correct.
